imf_annex_ii_price_measure_types_ea20: Electricity/gas unit subsidies; social tariffs; fuel support.
simulated_price_measures_in_programs: Electricity (CP0451): unit schedule; July 2022 household electricity subsidy: EUR 200/MWh. | August 2022 household electricity subsidy: EUR 337/MWh. | September 2022 household electricity subsidy: EUR 639/MWh. [2022-07 to 2022-09; unit_subsidy_rechained]. | Gas (CP0452): unit schedule; July 2022 natural gas subsidy: EUR 30/MWh. | October 2022 natural gas subsidy: EUR 90/MWh. imf_annex_ii_price_measure_types_ea20: Electricity and gas compensation/subsidy schedules.
simulated_price_measures_in_programs: Electricity (CP0451): maximum statutory unit compensation; Second half 2022: compensation cap of EUR 0.09/kWh above EUR 0.24/kWh. | First half 2023: compensation cap of EUR 0.285/kWh above EUR 0.28/kWh. [2022-07 to 2023-06; unit_subsidy_rechained]. | Gas (CP0452): statutory unit compensation converted from m3; Second half 2022: gas compensation of EUR 0.54/m3 converted with 10.55 kWh/m3. | First half 2023: gas compensation of EUR 0.99/m3 converted with 10.55 kWh/m3. [2022-07 to 2023-06; unit_subsidy_rechained].

imf_annex_ii_price_measure_types_ea20: Gas VAT cut; system-charge reductions; social energy bonus; fuel tax measures.
simulated_price_measures_in_programs: Gas (CP0452): Gas VAT reduction from ordinary 22% to 5%; system-charge reductions/social bonuses not included. [2022-01 to 2023-12; vat_exclusive_rechained]. | Electricity (CP0451): aggregate social-bonus equivalent; EUR 1.313bn / 3.766m bonuses / 2000 kWh, multiplied by an assumed 14.7% eligible-household share. [2022-01 to 2022-12; unit_subsidy_rechained]. | Gas (CP0452): aggregate social-bonus equivalent; EUR 849m / 2.441m bonuses / 10550 kWh, multiplied by an assumed 9.5% eligible-household share. [2022-01 to 2022-12; unit_subsidy_rechained].
coverage_notes: Italy social-bonus unit equivalents are plotted tests, not final HICP counterfactuals.

imf_annex_ii_price_measure_types_ea20: Gas/heat VAT cut; household electricity and heat caps/block support.
simulated_price_measures_in_programs: Gas (CP0452): VAT reduction on gas from the standard 25% to 5%; heating treatment shown separately when HICP CP0455 is available. [2022-04 to 2023-03; vat_exclusive_rechained]. | Heat energy (CP0455): VAT reduction on heating from the reduced 13% rate to 5%; depends on CP0455 availability. [2022-04 to 2023-03; vat_exclusive_rechained].

simulated_price_measures_in_programs: Electricity (CP0451): Electricity VAT kept/reduced at 10% relative to the normal 21% rate. [2021-09 to 2022-06; vat_exclusive_rechained]. | Electricity (CP0451): Electricity VAT reduction to 5%; modelled against the normal 21% rate. [2022-07 to 2023-06; vat_exclusive_rechained]. | Gas (CP0452): Natural gas and biomass VAT reduction to 5%; biomass is not separately modelled. [2022-10 to 2023-12; vat_exclusive_rechained]. | Electricity (CP0451): Spain retail electricity regression plus IMF-calibrated Iberian cap counterfactual [existing_spain_replication]. | Transport fuels (CP0722): Spain fuel rebate reconstruction, EUR 0.20/litre in Apr-Dec 2022 [unit_fuel_rebate_existing_replication].
